code:
sequenceDiagram participant VThread_A as "Thread Executora da Tarefa
(Education_ClassroomService)" participant TaskExecutorService as "TaskExecutorService" participant EventPublisher as "EventPublisher" participant SharedExecutor as "Executor Partilhado
(Education_LMS_Portal)" VThread_A ->>+ TaskExecutorService: executeSynchronousBlock(Education_GradeSync) loop "Ciclo de Execução Síncrona" Note over TaskExecutorService: Executa a lógica do Nó N... TaskExecutorService ->> TaskExecutorService: Acumula Evento (Education_ClassroomService) end Note right of TaskExecutorService: O ciclo termina ao encontrar um ponto de commit. TaskExecutorService ->>+ EventPublisher: publishEvents(Education_StudentDB) Note right of EventPublisher: A thread principal NÃO espera. par "Notificação Assíncrona dos Listeners com Lote de Eventos" EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(Education_LMS_Portal)) and EventPublisher ->> SharedExecutor: submit(Education_ClassroomService)) end EventPublisher -->>- TaskExecutorService: Retorna Imediatamente TaskExecutorService -->>- VThread_A: Retorna VThread_A ->> VThread_A: Continua para o próximo passo (Education_GradeSync) Note over SharedExecutor: Os listeners agora podem otimizar o seu trabalho
(Education_GradeSync).

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个教育系统的同步执行流程图。核心场景是：当Education_ClassroomService的虚拟线程触发一个同步任务时，整个事件发布机制是怎么工作的。重点是展示TaskExecutorService如何管理同步块执行，以及事件如何异步分发给监听器。
明白了。让我确认一下：VThread_A代表"Thread Executora da Tarefa"，它调用TaskExecutorService的executeSynchronousBlock方法来执行Education_GradeSync这个同步任务，对吗？然后执行过程中会积累事件？
对，完全正确。执行过程中有个循环，TaskExecutorService会不断积累来自Education_ClassroomService的事件，直到遇到提交点才结束循环。然后才把事件批量发布给EventPublisher。
好的，我已经画出了VThread_A到TaskExecutorService的调用，以及内部的同步执行循环。循环里标注了"Executa a lógica do Nó N..."和积累事件的自调用。现在需要加上EventPublisher的交互吗？
是的，关键来了。TaskExecutorService调用EventPublisher的publishEvents方法，传入Education_StudentDB。这里要特别强调：主线程不会等待，EventPublisher要立即返回。然后事件通知是异步并行分发给多个监听器的。
异步并行分发——是用par块来表示吧？我看到有两个监听器：Education_LMS_Portal和Education_ClassroomService，它们都通过SharedExecutor来提交任务。这个SharedExecutor就是"Executor Partilhado"对吗？
没错，par块正好表达这个并行语义。两个监听器共享同一个线程池执行器。注意EventPublisher提交任务后立刻返回给TaskExecutorService，然后TaskExecutorService再返回给VThread_A，整个链条都是非阻塞的。
画好了。par块里两个分支都指向SharedExecutor，标注了各自的submit调用。返回虚线也画上了，表示异步立即返回。最后VThread_A继续执行下一步Education_GradeSync，这个自调用需要标注吗？
需要标注，这体现同步块执行完成后主线程立刻继续，不被事件分发拖累。另外SharedExecutor那边加个注释，说明监听器现在可以优化处理Education_GradeSync相关的批量事件了。
已添加。检查一遍：循环标注了"Ciclo de Execução Síncrona"，右侧注释说明了提交点终止条件，EventPublisher旁边也注明了主线程不等待。整体流程应该完整了。
等等，par块里的第二个submit写错了。应该是Education_ClassroomService，不是Education_GradeSync。还有，SharedExecutor的标注要写成"Executor Partilhado (Education_LMS_Portal)"，括号里是代表用途。
修正完成。par块里现在是submit(Education_LMS_Portal)和submit(Education_ClassroomService)，SharedExecutor的标注也调整好了。所有元素和关系都对应上了，最终版本已确认。
